attributes.action: Make motorway bridges safer for the vulnerable and also motorists
attributes.additional_details: People have ended their life by jumping off motorway bridges, maybe this would slowdown their intention and they may seek help and would stop them from ending their life this way and also protect motorists, as this would be an awful situation for anyone directly involved. Also objects have been thrown from motorway bridges, which can also cause a catastrophic event.
attributes.background: Make motorway bridges safer by putting metal covers on them to protect vulnerable people and also protect motorists. There have sadly  been cases of loss of life and also objects being thrown from motorway bridges which could also result in fatal incidents for drivers using the motorway.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Install fences and barriers on bridges over motorways to help prevent suicide
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759398

Fund crisis support signs on motorway and railway bridges
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757944
